meta.title: LifeCareLog — Care for your life, one service at a time
meta.description: A one-person dev studio building small, meaningful services for everyday life.

hero.tagline: Designed for ease, small changes that matter
hero.headline:
Sometimes a small inconvenience
is worth fixing.
hero.subheadline:
I build services for anyone who needs them, even just one person.
Caring for life through thoughtful tools — LifeCareLog.
hero.brandPill: Care for your life, in every log

philosophy.headline:
I build services
for anyone
who needs them.
philosophy.description:
What seems trivial to one person
could change someone else's entire day.

If even a handful of people want something, I'll build it.
Small tools that take care of the parts of life we tend to overlook.
That's why I became a developer.
philosophy.quote:
My goal is to contribute by building services
that genuinely improve people's lives.

story.chapter1:
I spent five years as a frontend developer across several startups.
I enjoyed building products, but I never really got the chance
to build something I actually wanted to use myself.
story.chapter2:
One day, I was let go without much warning.
It was jarring at first — but looking back,
it gave me space to sit with a question I'd been avoiding:
"What do I actually want to build?"
story.chapter3:
As AI tools got better,
I realized I could build something real on my own.

From product thinking to design, development, and deployment —
it's slow going solo, but every decision is deliberate.
I'm building one service at a time, for anyone who needs it.
story.chapter4:
From calculators to legal search to mental wellness —
I'm working through the things people actually need.

planC.name: Plan-C
planC.tagline: Everyday calculators, all in one place

services.headline: What I'm building
services.subheadline:
From Plan-A to Plan-Z — building useful services for everyday life, one at a time.
Each service is a Plan, bringing one more piece of life into care.
services.vision: Three services now, but someday A to Z — I want to build tools that care for every part of life.

planC.title: Plan-C
planC.subtitle: Financial Calculators & Planner
planC.description:
Loan interest, severance pay, take-home salary...
When you search for these, ads come first.
Plan-C puts the most-needed calculators in one clean place — plus scenario planning and financial planner tools.
planC.features: Loan interest · Severance pay · Take-home salary · Savings calculator · Scenario planner

planL.title: Plan-L
planL.subtitle: AI Legal Search
planL.description:
What does this contract clause mean? Which law applies here?
Sometimes you want to understand before talking to a lawyer.
AI finds legal info and explains it in plain language.
planL.teaser: AI searches Korean statutes and explains them in plain language.
planL.features: Case search · Statute interpretation · Plain-language summary · AI analysis

planT.title: Plan-T
planT.subtitle: AI Mental Wellness App
planT.description:
How are you feeling today? Why?
When it's hard to put into words, AI listens quietly.
Plan-T is an iOS/Android app for daily mental wellness — in active development.
planT.features: Mood tracking · AI counseling · Wellness reports · Daily check-in

contact.headline: What's on your mind?
contact.subheadline:
Coffee chats, collaboration ideas, project requests — all welcome.
I read every message and reply personally.
contact.name: Name
contact.messagePlaceholder: Write whatever's on your mind. Long is fine.
contact.success: Got your message. I'll read it carefully and get back to you.
contact.errorNetwork: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
contact.errorEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email address.
contact.privacy: Your information is only used to respond to you and is never shared.

footer.brand: Building services that care for your life.
